title: derenbergia apiata
intro: Derenbergia apiata, also known as the "Queen of the Night," is a flowering plant that blooms only at night and wilts before dawn. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and lowering blood pressure, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Derenbergia apiata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
